description: baseline: naive ripple-carry, xor expanded to and/or/not, 3-product majority carry
g/p carry chain with p=a|b reused as half-sum — counterexample a=255 b=255 (p^c wrong when a=b=1)
or-propagate carry (a&b)|((a|b)&c) — correct but +6 cells: loses shared a^b between sum and carry
hand-folded bit-0 constant carry — tie at 34 (yosys already const-folds), more verbose source
mux-form sum (c&~h)|(~c&h) — ABC re-derives the xor, tie at 34, xor form simpler
